step_rationale: VWF multimer-size regulator; endothelial dysfunction marker; imbalance drives platelet hyperadhesion.
mechanism: ADAMTS13 deficiency permits ultralarge VWF multimer accumulation, amplifying platelet adhesion and thrombotic risk in acute coronary events.

references.title: Acute myocardial infarction as a systemic prothrombotic condition evidenced by increased von Willebrand factor protein over ADAMTS13 activity in coronary and systemic circulation.
